mapper.select: SELECT result_id, subject_id, statistics_version, total_area, total_owner_count, participating_area, participating_owner_count, quorum_satisfied, passed, result_payload::text AS result_payload, denominator_snapshot_id, attestation_tx_hash, execution_package_id, electorate_snapshot_id, proposal_snapshot_hash, rule_snapshot_hash, execution_package_hash, settled_at FROM t_voting_result WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_voting_result ( subject_id, statistics_version, total_area, total_owner_count, participating_area, participating_owner_count, quorum_satisfied, passed, result_payload, denominator_snapshot_id, attestation_tx_hash, execution_package_id, electorate_snapshot_id, proposal_snapshot_hash, rule_snapshot_hash, execution_package_hash ) VALUES ( #{subjectId}, #{statisticsVersion}, #{totalArea}, #{totalOwnerCount}, #{participatingArea}, #{participatingOwnerCount}, #{quorumSatisfied}, #{passed},
CAST(#{resultPayload} AS JSONB) NULL , #{denominatorSnapshotId}, #{attestationTxHash}, #{executionPackageId}, #{electorateSnapshotId}, #{proposalSnapshotHash}, #{ruleSnapshotHash}, #{executionPackageHash} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_voting_result SET statistics_version = #{statisticsVersion}, total_area = #{totalArea}, total_owner_count = #{totalOwnerCount}, participating_area = #{participatingArea}, participating_owner_count= #{participatingOwnerCount}, quorum_satisfied = #{quorumSatisfied}, passed = #{passed}, result_payload =
CAST(#{resultPayload} AS JSONB) NULL , denominator_snapshot_id = #{denominatorSnapshotId}, attestation_tx_hash = #{attestationTxHash}, execution_package_id = #{executionPackageId}, electorate_snapshot_id = #{electorateSnapshotId}, proposal_snapshot_hash = #{proposalSnapshotHash}, rule_snapshot_hash = #{ruleSnapshotHash}, execution_package_hash = #{executionPackageHash}, settled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
